metadata.name: WritingYourFirstSpec
metadata.description: Task-focused guide: author a screen_spec.json end-to-end for a counter screen. Covers uiVariables, eventHandlers, displayLogic, customTypes, and how to validate + generate + verify. ~12-min read. Uses an inline 5-step structure (not a Collection) since each step builds on the last, plus a closing troubleshooting block.

uiVariables.name: nextReadLinks
uiVariables.description: Two follow-up guides at the bottom (Navigation guide, Testing guide).

eventHandlers.name: onAppear
eventHandlers.description: Seed nextReadLinks with the static v1 catalog.

dataFlow.diagram:
flowchart TD
    VIEW[WritingYourFirstSpecView] --> VM[WritingYourFirstSpecViewModel]
    VM -- nextReadLinks --> VIEW
    VIEW -- onNavigate(url) --> VM
    VIEW -- onToggleLanguage --> VM

methods.name: onAppear
methods.description: Seed nextReadLinks from the module-scope NEXT_READ_ENTRIES catalog (two rows: next_navigation -> /guides/navigation, next_testing -> /guides/testing) and stamp currentLanguage from StringManager.language. Each row's titleKey / descriptionKey is resolved through StringManager with the guides_writing_your_first_spec_ namespace prefix.

methods.name: onNavigate
methods.description: Client-side navigation via router.push(url). Destinations are the spec-mapped URLs enumerated in transitions: /guides, /guides/navigation, /guides/testing.

vars.name: nextReadLinks
vars.description: Two closing 'read next' cards pointing at /guides/navigation and /guides/testing. Seeded by onAppear from the NEXT_READ_ENTRIES static catalog and re-seeded by onToggleLanguage.

transitions.condition: url is a spec-mapped guides URL or /guides
transitions.description: v1 targets: /guides, /guides/navigation, /guides/testing. Upcoming targets render their page once the guide's spec lands.

relatedFiles.description: Guide layout: header / TOC / 5 numbered steps (each an inline View with a CodeBlock) / troubleshooting block / next-reads / footer.
Same shape as the concept essay VMs.

notes: First live entry under the Guides tab. Flipping GUIDES_ENTRIES row 1 from 'upcoming' to 'live' in HomeViewModel is the final step.

Five numbered steps cover: (1) pick a name and a platform, (2) declare uiVariables, (3) declare eventHandlers, (4) declare customTypes, (5) validate and generate. Each step carries one CodeBlock showing exactly what to add.

The closing troubleshooting block is inline (not a Collection) — three common 'it didn't work' situations with symptom + cause + fix. Keeping it inline avoids the LearnArticleCard / TroubleshootRow cell overhead for a one-off appearance.

The guide's subject matter IS the framework's core flow (author spec → jui build → jui verify → iterate). Treating it as the Guides tab's keystone entry makes 'start here' obvious to a reader who already knows what JsonUI is but hasn't written one yet.
